---
title: "adjust_inflation"
author: "Abidur Rahman"
date: "2026-04-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Description:
Adjusts a time series of nominal asset values to account for inflation, converting amounts into real purchasing power. This allows users to estimate future value in terms of today’s dollars.

**Usage**

adjust_inflation(amounts, inflation_rate, years)

Arguments:
amounts = Numeric vector of nominal asset values over time.
inflation_rate = Annual inflation rate (as a decimal).
years = Number of years over which inflation adjustment is applied.


## Value:
A numeric vector of inflation-adjusted values corresponding to the input time series.

**Example**
```{r}
real_wealth <- adjust_inflation(wealth, inflation_rate = 0.02, years = 30)
real_wealth
```
